summary_one_line: Input must encode a 3-channel (RGB-equivalent) input and output color format so T_CHANNELS equals 3 on both formats.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The ICC profile header / colorspace fields must be arranged so the runtime InputFormat and OutputFormat both carry a channel count of exactly 3 (T_CHANNELS==3), satisfying the RGB-to-RGB precondition at cmsopt.c:1673. This depends on the colorspace-signature bytes at offsets 0x10-0x13 and the format-encoding bytes around 0x09-0x0d resolving to a 3-channel format rather than a non-3-channel one.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The vpc winner seeds carry varied colorspace signatures at offsets 0x10-0x13 (e.g. CLR/MCH2/GRAY) together with the profile-class bytes ff ff ff / prtr at 0x09-0x0d that, after the channel-count CMP is solved by I2S substitution, yield T_CHANNELS==3 and take the blocked True path 10/0 in the DIVERGENT BRANCHES W column.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile loser seeds are all stuck on a 'RGB ' (52 47 42 20) colorspace tag with 40 00 00 mntr format bytes at 0x09-0x0d and never flip the channel-count comparison; every loser trial stays on the False side (T=0 F=10), so the matrix-shaper RGB-to-RGB gate is never opened.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile: cmplog buffers the channel-count comparison operands during execution and splices the exact 3-channel format encoding back into the input bytes, deterministically passing the T_CHANNELS(*InputFormat)!=3 / T_CHANNELS(*OutputFormat)!=3 equality gate that value_profile's CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback alone never solves.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker at line 1673 is the RGB-to-RGB channel-count precondition gating OptimizeMatrixShaper.
The winner takes the True (blocked) side of line 1673 while the loser only ever takes the False side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1673  T=10 F=0  T=0 F=10  if (T_CHANNELS(*InputFormat) != 3 || T_CHANNELS(*OutputFo...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner colorspace-tag bytes at offsets 0x10-0x13 are varied non-RGB tags while loser bytes are uniformly RGB.
Loser seeds carry the mntr/40-00-00 format encoding that winners do not.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies only on havoc plus CMP_MAP distance feedback.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, the technique distinguishing the winner.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S technique delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2227 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 2ae6e79bde90fb85`; the 30-level ancestor chain contains 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 29, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current vpc build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on T_CHANNELS==3 in which value_profile resolves the branch as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP distance feedback alone solves the channel-count equality without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact input-byte pre-image that I2S substitutes to make T_CHANNELS==3 is inferred from the format/colorspace byte-diff rather than directly traced through the ICC format-derivation code path.
